active_answer: when transitioning from one activity to another
active_question: When does the Consent C.A.R.E.S. guidance especially call for step-by-step check-ins?
edited_answer: Because consent can be renegotiated or withheld at any time, including during transitions.
edited_question: Why does Consent C.A.R.E.S. call for step-by-step check-ins when moving to another activity?
paraphrase_rationale: The replacement explains why transitions require check-ins instead of asking only when they occur.
reason: The replacement explains why transitions require check-ins instead of asking only when they occur.
support_evidence: Especially when transitioning from one activity to another, consent can be renegotiated or withheld at any time. Check in every step of the way.
